description.from:
## Summary
Define the staged optimization protocol that combines fixed deterministic checks and random generalization checks.

## Deliverables
- Specify the role of the small fixed regression set versus the larger fixed benchmark set.
- Define when deterministic checks run, when random checks run, and when stronger multi-random confirmation is required.
- Define how sample size, time range, and random-run count are chosen for the workflow.

## Notes
This task defines the operational protocol; it should stay aligned with the fixed-dataset role model.
description.to:
## Summary
Define the staged optimization protocol for workflow orchestration under plx-c2f8bb.

## Locked protocol
- Stage A: deterministic/associated-dataset reference check.
- Stage B: random generalization loop run (n=50, default days=180).
- Stage C: hard-gate random confirmation run (n=200) required before final accept.
- Stage D: decision synthesis from value()/assess_candidate() plus malfunction-routing signals.

## Policy defaults
- min_reference_delta=0.01
- max_generalization_drop=0.02
- No champion promotion in this workflow.

## Acceptance criteria
- A final accept decision is impossible without Stage C completion.
- Deterministic and random evidence must both be present for final decision.
